# debugDescription

**Instance Property**

The filename, represented as a potentially lossy conversion to a string.

## Declaration

```swift
var debugDescription: String { get }
```

## Discussion

The exact details of the string conversion may change in the future.

## Accessing filename properties

- **data**: The byte sequence of the filename, as a data object.
- **string**: The filename, represented as a Unicode string.

items.description: The byte sequence of the filename, as a data object.
